infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Waypoint uses your location to show you on the group map and to match your photos to trip stops.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Waypoint reads your camera roll to automatically match your trip photos to days and stops.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Waypoint saves shared trip photos to your camera roll.
